headline: Coca-Cola formalizes compensation arrangements for incoming CEO Henrique Braun and transitioning Executive Chairman James Quincey, effective March 31, 2026.
investor_impact: The finalized compensation packages ensure a smooth leadership transition and maintain strong alignment with shareholder interests through a 200% target annual incentive. This structured succession plan provides strategic continuity and should reassure the market.
key_figures: 200% (Target annual incentive of base salary for both executives)
